command: cd C:/Users/Cameron/Projects/peon-ping && mkdir -p .gitban/agents/reviewer/logs && LOG_FILE=".gitban/agents/reviewer/logs/WINTEST-cb0gpg-reviewer-1.jsonl" && TS=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") && echo "{\"timestamp\":\"${TS}\",\"operation\":\"init\",\"role\":\"reviewer\",\"sprint\":\"WINTEST\",\"card_id\":\"cb0gpg\",\"cycle\":1}" > "$LOG_FILE" && echo "{\"timestamp\":\"${TS}\",\"operation\":\"event\",\"label\":\"read-diff\",\"metadata\":{\"commit\":\"7b5c5ae\"}}" >> "$LOG_FILE" && echo "{\"timestamp\":\"${TS}\",\"operation\":\"event\",\"label\":\"read-card\",\"metadata\":{\"card_id\":\"cb0gpg\"}}" >> "$LOG_FILE" && echo "{\"timestamp\":\"${TS}\",\"operation\":\"event\",\"label\":\"write-review\",\"metadata\":{\"verdict\":\"REJECTION\"}}" >> "$LOG_FILE" && echo "{\"timestamp\":\"${TS}\",\"operation\":\"event\",\"label\":\"card-status-change\",\"metadata\":{\"new_status\":\"blocked\"}}" >> "$LOG_FILE" && echo "{\"timestamp\":\"${TS}\",\"operation\":\"summary\",\"total_commands\":0,\"failed_commands\":0,\"total_duration_s\":0}" >> "$LOG_FILE"

cd C:/Users/Cameron/Projects/peon-ping && git add .gitban/agents/executor/inbox/WINTEST-cb0gpg-executor-1.md .gitban/agents/router/logs/WINTEST-cb0gpg-router-1.jsonl .gitban/cards/*.md 2>/dev/null; git add .gitban/cards/ 2>/dev/null; git status

cd C:/Users/Cameron/Projects/peon-ping && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore: route cb0gpg review 1 REJECTION to executor

EOF
)"
